subject: GRB 2974 follow-up observations
body:
On 16 December 2003 BART telescope observed the region reported by GCN as GRB 
2974. We have acquired 14 120 sec wide field images in I and R filter of the 
region before meteorological conditions worsened so we were unable to take 
further images. Limiting magnitude estimate is 13. The first image exposure 
started at 19:48:27 UT, 14 minutes 20 second after event.

During first quick analysis we did not find any transient like source. Further 
data analysis is planned.

JPEG images preview are available at 
http://lascaux.asu.cas.cz/bartdb/targets.php?tar_id=5882.

This message is quotable in publications.

Jan Strobl and Petr Kubanek on behalf of the BART Team (Ondrejov, Czech 
Republic - Martin Jelinek, Rene Hudec, Martin Topinka, Filip Munz, Martin 
Nekola) and BOOTES (Granada, Spain - Alberto J. Castro-Tirado, Tomas de J. 
Mateo Sanguino, Antonio de Ugarte Postigo)


[GCN OPS NOTE (17dec03):  This Circular was received at 18:43 16 Dec 03 UT,
but was delayed in distribution because of a lack of an authorized entry
in the submitor's list.]
